meaning: n.办公桌,衣柜 <美>局,办公署
examples: I wondered what else he'd taken and nosed around his bureau.
The Better Business Bureau holds an enormous amount of information on any business problem.
A baseball mitt and ball rested on top of the bureau.
Based out of the network's New York bureau, Lemon joined CNN in September 2006.
If you spot any spurious information, demand that the credit bureau investigate and correct it.
